creator: giffunip@tutopia.com
text:
FWIW,
 A quick review (by OpenGrok) shows the affected code lives in:

 include/rpc
 lib/libc/rpc
 sys/rpc

 and also
 usr.sbin/rpcbind

 Where relicensing corresponds to this commit:

 http://git.infradead.org/users/steved/rpcbind.git/commitdiff/f0ce398219c1d80acb2072386c84ce047e84dabc
